Article Title: Explained: How much will it cost to watch the FIFA World Cup?
Article Text:
FIFA World Cup 2026 trophy (PTI Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

How many tickets are available and how strong is demand?

Ticket Prices Rise at the Expanded World Cup

Prices May Go Higher

Other Costs for Fans

Tickets for the World Cup, which starts in North America in 100 days, are expensive — costing nearly $900 for the opening match and more than $8,000 for the final.AFP Sport explains the cost of attending games at the tournament.According to FIFA, nearly seven million tickets have been made available for the World Cup. Each person can buy up to four tickets per match and a maximum of 40 tickets for the whole tournament.About two million tickets were sold in the first lottery held in October. A second sales phase in December and January, also run as a lottery, received a record 508 million ticket requests, showing huge global demand.FIFA has not confirmed how many tickets were sold in that phase. However, the most in-demand matches include the Group K game between Colombia and Portugal in Miami on June 27, co-hosts Mexico vs South Korea in Guadalajara on June 18, and the final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey on July 19.There will be 104 matches at this World Cup, the first time the tournament will have 48 teams.But ticket prices for the biggest games are very high.A fan group said tickets were first promised to start at $21, but the cheapest tickets actually sold have been around $60. For many big matches, most tickets cost at least $200.For the final, the cheapest seats cost about $2,000, while the best seats go up to $8,680.On resale websites, prices are even higher. One ticket for the final was listed for over $140,000, much more than its original price.FIFA president Gianni Infantino said prices are high because demand is very strong."In the US in particular there is this thing called dynamic pricing, meaning the prices will go up or down", depending on the match in question, he said.After complaints, FIFA released some cheaper $60 tickets, but these are limited and only available to fans of teams that qualified.FIFA is also selling VIP packages that include better seats and lounge access. These packages can cost between $2,900 and $4,500 for some matches.FIFA will release more tickets from April on a first-come, first-served basis.Fans can also buy tickets from resale websites, but sellers can set their own prices. In the US and Canada, there are no strict rules on resale prices.For example, A "category three" seat -- the highest section of the stands -- for the tournament's opening game between Mexico and South Africa at Mexico City's Azteca Stadium on June 11 was recently listed at $5,324, compared to an original price of $895. Other sites such as SeatGeek and StubHub were selling tickets at slightly lower prices.Fans also have to pay for parking, which is expensive. Parking can cost $100 in some cities and up to $300 in others.An alternative for visiting fans who do not have match tickets is to go to one of the Fan Festivals in and around the 16 host cities. The Fan Fest in Kansas City will be able to welcome up to 25,000 people. In New York, the US Open tennis venue at Flushing Meadows will be transformed into a fan zone holding up to 10,000 paying visitors, albeit only from June 17 to 28.
Article Summary: FIFA says nearly seven million tickets have been made available for the World Cup. Each person can buy up to four tickets per match and a maximum of 40 tickets for the whole tournament. The most in-demand matches include the Group K game between Colombia and Portugal in Miami on June 27.

Article Title: India smash Zimbabwe, shatter records to keep semi-final hopes alive
Article Text:
Indian cricket team (ANI)

India Playing XI drama: How three players are fighting for two spots | Sanju Samson IN?

India did not just win on Thursday night, they produced one of the most complete batting performances in their T20 World Cup history. The 256 for four against Zimbabwe was their highest total in the tournament and it came with 17 sixes, the joint most India have hit in a T20 World Cup innings, going past the 15 they struck against Australia in Gros Islet in 2024. India have now smashed 63 sixes in this edition, their highest in a single World Cup, with only West Indies on 66 ahead of them overall.What stood out even more was the collective intent. All six Indian batters scored at a strike rate above 150, the first time in T20 World Cup history that six or more players have scored 20-plus runs at that tempo in the same innings. There were only 26 dot balls in the entire 20 overs, equalling the fewest in a completed innings at the tournament. The pressure never dipped and Zimbabwe were forced to chase leather almost throughout. Abhishek Sharma set the tone. After three ducks following his return from illness, he found his rhythm with a 26-ball fifty that reignited India’s charge. Sanju Samson provided early fluency, Ishan Kishan kept the momentum intact and then Hardik Pandya and Tilak Varma delivered the knockout blows. Pandya powered his way to an unbeaten fifty, while Tilak, who had faced questions over his strike rate, hammered 44 off 16 balls at a strike rate of 275.India scored 80 runs in the final five overs to put the game out of reach.Zimbabwe had their own highlight through Brian Bennett’s unbeaten 97, the second highest individual score against India in T20 World Cups after Chris Gayle’s 98 in 2010. Bennett’s assault included a 26-run over off Shivam Dube, whose 46 runs conceded in his first two overs became the most by a bowler at that stage of a T20 World Cup match.In the larger picture, this was India rediscovering their attacking identity after a heavy defeat to South Africa. The sixes, the strike rates and the minimal dot balls all reflected a team that recalibrated quickly and struck back with authority, keeping their semifinal hopes alive in emphatic fashion.
Article Summary: India produced one of the most complete batting performances in their T20 World Cup history. The 256 for four against Zimbabwe was their highest total in the tournament. India have now smashed 63 sixes in this edition, their highest in a single World Cup. All six Indian batters scored at a strike rate above 150.

Article Title: Dominiq Ponder Cause Of Death: Dominiq Ponder's cause of death: Colorado QB's sudden death at 23 leaves the NFL world stunned
Article Text:
Dominiq Ponder's cause of death: Colorado QB's sudden death at 23 leaves the NFL world stunned

Dominiq Ponder's cause of death confirmed after a fatal single-car crash in Colorado

This is heartbreaking 💔.”

,

Colorado football faced a painful moment on March 1, 2026. QB Dominiq Ponder died in a tragic car crash at just 23. HC Deion Sanders confirmed the news later that evening, sending shockwaves through the college football community.As tributes poured in, one detail became central to the story. Fans and teammates wanted clarity about Dominiq Ponder's cause of death. Authorities released those answers Sunday night, turning grief into a stark reminder of how quickly life can change.Per reports, Dominiq Ponder's cause of death was a single-vehicle accident early Sunday morning, March 1, 2026. According to a Colorado State Patrol press release issued later that day, Ponder lost control of the Tesla Model 3 he was driving.The vehicle struck a guardrail, hit an electrical line pole, and then rolled down an embankment. The car later caught fire. Officials confirmed he died at the scene. No other vehicles were involved.Ponder had spent the past two seasons as a walk-on quarterback with the Colorado Buffaloes. He appeared in two games during the 2024 season, logging two rush attempts and one pass attempt. His on-field opportunities were limited, but teammates often spoke about his energy during practice.HC. Deion Sanders reacted publicly on March 1, 2026, through a post on X. “Dom was one of my favorites! He was Loved, Respected & a Born Leader. Let’s pray for all that knew him & had the opportunity to be in his presence. Lord, you’re receiving a good 1. Comfort us, Lord, Comfort us,” Sanders wrote on his official account Sunday evening. His message reflected the bond inside the locker room.Fellow QB Colton Allen also wrote his heartfelt note, “Dom, you were a blessing to so many people,” Allen wrote. “You had a presence about you that just made everything better. You brought so much joy to me and everyone around you. I’m grateful for every lift, every practice, every rep, every conversation we got to share. I’ll carry those with me for the rest of my life. What happened feels so final. It feels heavy. It hurts. ”One fan wrote, “Another said“Praying for everyone, my brother!!!! So heartbreaking!!!!”Before transferring to Colorado, Ponder played at Bethune-Cookman. He attended Miami Carol City and Naples High School in Florida, then Myrtle Beach Collegiate Academy in South Carolina. His career showed persistence. He kept working, kept transferring, and kept chasing a chance to prove himself.Spring practice in Boulder was scheduled to begin March 2, 2026. Instead, the program entered the week in mourning. Dominiq Ponders' sudden demise now stands as a tragic footnote to a young career that teammates say still held promise.
Article Summary: Dominiq Ponder, 23, died in a single-vehicle accident early Sunday morning, March 1, 2026. Ponder had spent the past two seasons as a walk-on quarterback with the Colorado Buffaloes. He appeared in two games during the 2024 season, logging two rush attempts and one pass attempt.

Article Title: India qualification scenario: What Team India needs to do to reach T20 World Cup semi-finals
Article Text:
Shivam Dube, left, captain Suryakumar Yadav and Hardik Pandya (AP Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

India keep T20 World Cup dream alive, over to Kolkata now

India Semifinal Qualification Scenario



NEW DELHI: The uncertainty surrounding India’s campaign at the ICC Men’s T20 World Cup 2026 has finally cleared. After a dramatic round of Super 8 matches, the defending champions now have a straightforward path to the knockouts.South Africa’s commanding nine-wicket win over West Indies in Ahmedabad confirmed the Proteas’ place in the semi-finals from Group 1. Later in the day, India strengthened their position with a resounding 72-run victory over Zimbabwe in Chennai.With Zimbabwe eliminated and South Africa already through, the final Group 1 clash between India and West Indies at Eden Gardens on Sunday has effectively turned into a virtual quarterfinal.The equation is simple: India must beat the West Indies to qualify for the semi-finals.Both teams currently sit on two points from two matches. The winner of Sunday’s encounter will join South Africa in the last four.There is, however, one small caveat. If the match is washed out due to rain — and there is no reserve day — West Indies would advance on the basis of a superior net run rate, knocking India out of the tournament.At present, though, there is no forecast suggesting weather disruption in Kolkata.In short, the calculators are back in the bag. For India, it is purely a win-and-progress scenario.India’s qualification push gathered serious momentum after a batting masterclass against Zimbabwe. Posting 256/4 — the second-highest total in men’s T20 World Cup history — India entertained home fans with a barrage of sixes. Abhishek Sharma returned to form with a blistering half-century, while Hardik Pandya and Tilak Varma provided a thunderous finish. Zimbabwe fought back through Brian Bennett’s unbeaten 97, but India’s bowlers ensured a comfortable victory.Earlier, South Africa’s clinical chase of 177 against West Indies reshaped the group. A rapid opening partnership between Aiden Markram and Quinton de Kock made light work of the target, underlining why the Proteas remain unbeaten in the tournament.
Article Summary: South Africa’s commanding nine-wicket win over West Indies in Ahmedabad confirmed the Proteas’ place in the semi-finals from Group 1. India strengthened their position with a resounding 72-run victory over Zimbabwe in Chennai. With Zimbabwe eliminated and South Africa already through, the final Group 1 clash between India and West Indies at Eden Gardens on Sunday has effectively turned into a virtual quarterfinal.

Article Title: T20 World Cup: South Africa subdue Sikandar Raza brilliance, go to the semifinal unbeaten
Article Text:
Sikander Raza of Zimbabwe (Getty Images)

T20 World Cup: Sikandar Raza press conference after SA vs ZIM

NEW DELHI: The individual brilliance of Zimbabwean skipper Sikandar Raza couldn’t stop the South African juggernaut on Sunday. Despite resting three of their frontline bowlers for the inconsequential tie, the outcome remained unchanged for the South Africans as they registered a five-wicket win here at the Arun Jaitley Stadium.With their seventh successive victory in the tournament, the Proteas topped Group 1 with six points and will now fly to Kolkata full of confidence to take on New Zealand in the first semifinal of the T20 World Cup on Wednesday. The South African back-up bowlers proved that they are good enough to step in if a need arises in the final stages of the tournament as their bowlers restricted Zimbabwe to 153 for seven on a pitch that offered indifferent bounce.After hitting a blistering half-century to give Zimbabwe a total of respectability, the Proteas were given a scare by Raza with the ball early on, but they managed to overcome the initial jitters to knock off the runs in 17.5 overs losing five wickets.The only challenge to the South African bowling attack was posed by Zimbabwean skipper Raza, who blazed his way to a sublime 73 from 45 balls. While the rest of the Zimbabwean batsmen struggled against the pace of the South African bowlers, or sometimes the lack of it, Raza seemed to be in a different mode.He strode out to the crease when Zimbabwe’s best batsman of the tournament, Brian Bennett (15), was dismissed only for the second time in the World Cup by Anrich Nortje in the fifth over. For the next 11 overs, Raza dictated terms as he drove, pulled and cut the South African bowlers with disdain.He took only three balls to settle down before launching himself against Corbin Bosch. He welcomed the big-built Proteas pacer to the attack with a four and a six of successive balls in the final over of the Powerplay.After smashing eight fours and four sixes, Raza was finally dismissed by young pacer Kwena Maphaka in the 16th over of the Zimbabwean innings as he only managed a leading edge to a cutter and was caught by David Miller at cover point. Once Raza was dismissed, Zimbabwe managed just 27 runs off the last 23 balls. Maphaka was the pick of the South African bowlers as he finished with 2/21. But Raza wasn’t done yet.Opening the bowling, he struck off his third ball, having Quinton de Kock caught behind for a duck. He struck again in his next over by castling his opposite number, Aiden Markram (4), with a ball that kept low and managed to reduce the Proteas to 14 for two. But the others couldn’t sustain the pressure.While Dewald Brevis 42 (18 balls, 2x4, 4x6) imposed himself on Zimbabwean bowlers with a counter-attacking innings, Ryan Rickelton (31, 22 balls) and David Miller (22, 16 balls) played cameos to get the job done.
Article Summary: South Africa beat Zimbabwe by five wickets in T20 World Cup quarter-final. Zimbabwe captain Sikandar Raza top scored with 73 from 45 balls. Proteas top Group 1 with six points and will play New Zealand in semifinal.

Article Title: Australia captain thanks 'cricket gods'; bows out of ODI cricket with a century
Article Text: Fans cheer Alyssa Healy of Australia from the field during game three of the Women's One Day International series between Australia and India at Bellerive Oval on March 01, 2026 in Hobart, Australia. (Photo/Getty Images)
Article Summary: Alyssa Healy was named as one of Australia's best ODI bowlers. She was part of the side that beat India in Hobart on March 1, 2026. The match was the third of a five-match series between Australia and India.

Article Title: Ice-cool Sanju Samson fires India into T20 World Cup semis
Article Text:
Sanju Samson celebrates his half century during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 cricket match between India and West Indies, at the Eden Gardens, in Kolkata, West Bengal. (PTI Photo)

TimesofIndia.com in Kolkata:

Sanju Samson becomes darling of Eden Gardens | T20 World Cup

Sanju Samson plays a shot during the T20 World Cup Super 8 Group 1 match against West Indies at Eden Gardens Stadium in Kolkata. (ANI)

Jasprit Bumrah celebrates the wicket of Roston Chase during the T20 World Cup cricket match between India and West Indies in Kolkata. (AP)

West Indies' Rovman Powell and Jason Holder run between wickets during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 Super 8 Group 1 match against India at Eden Gardens Stadium, in Kolkata on Sunday. (ANI)

Brief Scores:

Moments after hitting the winning boundary, Sanju Samson took off his helmet and dropped to his knees to thank the almighty. Relief washed over the face of the right-hander who fired India into the T20 World Cup semifinals with a breathtaking knock. Even before the crowd could capture the winning moments, "Vande Mataram" played at full volume as the Indian dugout rushed out to celebrate what was a top run-chase under pressure. "Lehra Do" was up next and the laser lights joined the act as the announcer egged the crowd on. The party was only getting started in Kolkata after India (199/5) beat West Indies (195/4) with four deliveries to spare.Until a week ago in Ahmedabad, Sanju Samson was nowhere close to the Playing XI as India were happy with the two left-handers Ishan Kishan and Abhishek Sharma as their two openers.However, the consistent off-spin threat, which led to early wickets, forced the think-tank to rework its strategy and bring Samson, a right-hander, back to the top of the order. He had lost his spot to an in-form Kishan but the tactical call forced the left-hander down to No.3 and left-right was restored.The move worked in the must-win game against Zimbabwe in Chennai earlier this week as it not only gave India a brisk start but also kept spin away.Although spin was introduced early in Kolkata and India lost two early wickets, Samson unlocked his maximum potential when the team had its back to the wall. Chasing a stiff target, the right-hander played an unforgettable knock to help India advance to the semi-final of the multi-nation tournament. He drove well, cut fiercely and exhibited big-match temperament in front of a capacity crowd at the Eden Gardens.Pace or spin, Samson took them down with aplomb and never lost shape in the process. He hit the ball where it was meant to be hit but his ice-cool nerves stood out during his 50-ball 97*, which included 12 boundaries and four sixes.The pitch had a lot of dew and the absence of demons made batting less difficult; however, the scoreboard pressure of the virtual quarter-final made it a daunting task. Wickets falling from the other end didn't change Samson's approach; he continued to operate at a healthy strike-rate and kept the asking rate in check. The partnership with Suryakumar Yadav put the chase on track after the early wickets, giving it the much needed push with the breezy 42-run stand, off only 26 balls, with Tilak Varma.When Hardik Pandya joined Samson, the equation was under control: 55 runs were needed off 32 balls. With batting to follow, India controlled the game from that point. Samson and Pandya put India in striking distance of the win, with Samson helping India cross the line with five wickets in hand.Earlier, after electing to field first, India's fielding was a major disappointment, and the group let the bowlers down in excellent batting conditions. Three misfield boundaries, two dropped catches and one missed run-out opportunity cost India dearly as they were not able to peg the high-flying West Indies batting line-up back with regular breakthroughs. The situation wasn't alarming by any means at the halfway mark, as the bowlers kept the score down to 82/1. The scoreboard could have been much worse had they taken the catch and capitalised on the run-out opportunity but it was nowhere near panic territory.Both Jasprit Bumrah and Varun Chakravarthy had three overs left, and Suryakumar Yadav's smart bowling changes gave India a tactical edge going into the second half of the innings. The West Indies signalled intent as they took 17 runs off Chakaravarthy's second over. Body language dropped ever so briefly because Eden Gardens was about to erupt in the 12th over, bowled by Bumrah.Two wickets, including that of the dangerous Shimron Hetmyer, got the crowd roaring and 'Boom Boom Bumrah' chants reverberated in the stands every time the bowler stood on top of his mark. He had the matchup advantage over the left-hander and dismissed him in just two deliveries, adding another wicket with a slower ball that completely deceived the well-set Roston Chase. From 102/1, the scoreboard became 103/3 in the space of a couple of deliveries and India did what assistant coach Ryan ten Doeschate expected: fight fire with fire.When the hosts circled for the final drinks interval of the innings at the end of the 14th over, the scoreboard showed a controlled 119/3, but India still had to get a Hardik Pandya over out of the way. During the break, head coach Gautam Gambhir went straight to the all-rounder and discussed the angle he could explore against Sherfane Rutherford. Pandya executed the plan perfectly, dismissing the left-hander off the first delivery to put India in a commanding position.125/4 with just five to play wasn't a bad position, especially with four overs from Bumrah and Arshdeep, and one from Chakarvarthy remaining. Heavy dew started to settle in but one would have backed them to do the job in those crunch situations.What unfolded, however, in the next five overs was a very calculated muscular assault from Rovman Powell and Jason Holder; together, they added 70 runs in the next 30 deliveries, taking down Bumrah, Arshdeep, and Chakarvarthy in the process.Bumrah conceded 26 runs in his last two overs, Chakarvarthy conceded 14, and Arshdeep leaked 30 from his remaining two overs. The 16th over, bowled by Arshdeep, swung momentum West Indies' way as 24 runs came off it. The left-armer looked out of sorts, conceding two sixes, five wides and two more wides, causing shoulders to drop in the field. Bumrah gave it his all in the two remaining overs and his reaction after Varun let a ball go for a boundary summed up the overall performance in the field. Which was a big let down on their biggest evening of the tournament till date.However, a special Samson plastered all the cracks to book a semi-final date with England at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai on March 5.West Indies 195/4 in 20 overs (Roston Chase 40, Jason Holder 37, Rovman Powell 34; Jasprit Bumrah 2-36)India: 199/5 in 19.2 overs (Sanju Samson 97; Jason Holder 2-38)
Article Summary: India beat West Indies by five wickets to reach T20 World Cup semi-final. Sanju Samson scored 97 not out to fire India into the last four in Kolkata. West Indies were bowled out for 195 in their first innings.

Article Title: T20 World Cup: South Africa coach's 'cupcake' jibe after another 'chokers' reminder
Article Text:
South Africa's Marco Jansen and teammates (ANI Photo)

TimesofIndia.com in New Delhi:

T20 World Cup: Ashwell Prince press conference before SA vs ZIM

South Africa are on an unbeaten run in the T20 World Cup. Except for the double Super Over against Afghanistan, they've steamrolled top teams, including India, whom they beat by 76 runs. On a seven-match winning streak, South Africa hopes to shed their 'chokers' tag.The legacy of that tag has followed the Proteas for the past two decades. It started with the 1999 World Cup loss to Australia and persisted until the 2024 T20 World Cup, losing the final to India in the Caribbean.Now, the reigning World Test Championship winners are the team to beat in the T20 World Cup being played in India and Sri Lanka. Their winning run continued with a 5-wicket win over Zimbabwe on Sunday. Coach Shukri Conrad was asked if this brings pressure and the much-dreaded reminder of being chokers?"There's always pressure. I think it's what you do with that pressure and how you shift the pressure.As for the C-word [chokers], I think there's another one for that - 'cupcakes.' I'm sure we kind of enjoyed that," said Conrad.The cupcake reference relates to a TV advert in the lead-up to the India vs South Africa Super Eight match where an Indian fan jokingly told a South Africa supporter about "repeating history" from the 2024 T20 World Cup while teasing them over a cupcake. But after South Africa's resounding win against India in Ahmedabad, that dig flipped on its head."No, there's always pressure and it's really about embracing that pressure. And we don't do things any differently. We're going to prepare exactly the same way for New Zealand. Whether we start as favourites? Probably because we're the only unbeaten side in the competition. But I don't know if that adds to the pressure," continued Conrad."I think the semi-final is pressure enough. Playing a tough side in New Zealand is pressure enough. So there's no added pressure."I'm glad that we're favourites because I always felt that as a South African team you want to be able to play as a favourite because it's easy being an underdog. The expectation isn't that much. But if we can continue doing what we're doing then we need a little bit of luck along the way as well."Hopefully that will give us the result on Wednesday and then on to our 'home ground' in Ahmedabad," he finished cheekily.
Article Summary: South Africa are on an unbeaten run in the T20 World Cup. Coach Shukri Conrad was asked if this brings pressure and the much-dreaded reminder of being chokers. Conrad: "There's always pressure and it's really about embracing that pressure"

Article Title: ISL: Odisha come from behind to hold Chennaiyin
Article Text:
ISL 2026: Chennaiyin FC settle for a point in spirited draw against Odisha FC

T20 World Cup: Gautam Gambhir on Sanju Samson, Jasprit Bumrah and record chase vs West Indies

There was hardly anything to separate the two sides locking horns at Kalinga Stadium on Sunday as Odisha FC came from behind to share the honours and points with Chennaiyin FC in an Indian Super League (ISL) match in Bhubaneswar.While this was the second draw in as many matches for Odisha, the 1-1 result helped the visitors pick up their first point of the season following consecutive defeats in their first two rounds of games.In another match played in Mumbai, a late equaliser by Lallianzuala Chhangte helped Mumbai City FC secure a 1-1 draw against NorthEast United FC .
Article Summary: Odisha FC and Chennaiyin FC draw 1-1 in Indian Super League (ISL) match in Bhubaneswar. Lallianzuala Chhangte's late equaliser helps Mumbai City FC draw with NorthEast United FC. Mumbai had lost their first two matches of the season.

Article Title: Arsenal strengthen title Hopes, Manchester United move up to third
Article Text:
Arsenal's Jurrien Timber celebrates after scoring (AP Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

Manchester United

Boost

Champions League

Hopes

Tottenham and Forest Struggle

Arsenal boosted their Premier League title hopes with an important 2–1 win over Chelsea on Sunday. The victory restored their five-point lead over second-placed Manchester City, who had beaten Leeds a day earlier.Jurrien Timber scored the winning goal in the second half. Arsenal are now closer to winning their first league title since 2004. Their biggest remaining challenge could be their upcoming match against Manchester City next month.Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta said his team feels they must keep winning because the competition is so strong.“We have the feeling that we have to win and win and win. You win so many games, but it is not enough to open the gap.That is the level of this league,” Arteta said.Chelsea pushed hard for a late equalizer, even after going down to 10 men. Goalkeeper David Raya made a crucial save near the end, and Chelsea also had a late goal ruled out for offside.William Saliba gave Arsenal the lead from a corner in the first half. Chelsea equalized through an own goal by Piero Hincapie, but Timber later scored with a header from another corner to secure the win.Manchester United climbed to third place after beating Crystal Palace 2–1.“It feels like a big result,” United captain Bruno Fernandes said after his team beat Palace.Benjamin Sesko scored the winning goal, his seventh in eight games. Bruno Fernandes also scored from the penalty spot after Palace defender Maxence Lacroix was sent off.United have improved under interim manager Michael Carrick, who is unbeaten since taking charge in January. He has won six of his seven matches so far. Carrick said it feels good to see the team playing with confidence again.Across his two spells as Manchester United coach, Michael Carrick has earned 23 points from his first nine league games. According to stats provider Opta, this is the joint-highest points total ever by a manager after their first nine matches in Premier League history — matching the start made by Ange Postecoglou at Tottenham.“This place means a lot to me so to have the sort of positivity and everyone enjoying going to the games and watching it and for me to have an influence on that, I’m not going to lie, it feels good,” Carrick said.Palace had taken an early lead through Lacroix, but United showed strong character to come back and win.“We were behind so we had to show some character,” Fernandes said. "The result gives us the chance of getting third but there are a lot of games still to go. We have a lot to do and it is important we don’t feel like we are already in the place we want to be.”Tottenham’s poor form continued with a 2–1 loss to Fulham. Spurs have now gone 10 league games without a win and are just four points above the relegation zone.Fulham scored twice in the first half through Harry Wilson and Alex Iwobi. Richarlison scored for Tottenham in the second half, but it was not enough.Nottingham Forest also lost 2–1 to Brighton and remain close to the relegation zone. Forest have now lost two straight games under their new coach, Vitor Pereira.
Article Summary: Arsenal restore five-point lead over second-placed Manchester City. Manchester United climb to third place after beating Crystal Palace 2–1. Tottenham's poor form continued with a 2-1 loss to Fulham. Nottingham Forest remain close to the relegation zone after losing to Brighton.

Article Title: US-Israel strike Iran: With homeland under attack, Iran women chase FIFA World Cup dream
Article Text:
Iranian women's national football team captain Zahra Ghanbari reacts during a press conference ahead of their game against South Korea on Monday at Robina Stadium on the Gold Coast, Australia, Sunday, March 1, 2026. (AP)

IRAN UNDER ATTACK: Explosions Rock Tehran As Israel & US Launch Aerial Strikes On Islamic Republic

Football authorities have extended support to Iran’s women’s team competing in Australia at the Women’s Asian Cup after military strikes by the United States and Israel on Iran.Iran’s 26-member squad reached the Gold Coast days before the attacks on Saturday, which killed supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei as Washington and Tel Aviv seek to topple the Islamic Republic. The team is scheduled to begin its campaign against South Korea on Monday.The Asian Football Confederation said it is monitoring developments.The AFC said in a statement it "continues to closely monitor the recent developments in the Middle East during this challenging period"."The AFC's foremost priority remains the welfare, safety and security of all players, coaches, officials and fans," it added."In this regard, we are in close and regular contact with the Iran women's national team and officials on the Gold Coast and are offering our full support and assistance."Head coach Marziyeh Jafari addressed the media on Sunday ahead of the opener but focused on football. She said the tournament gives her players an opportunity to highlight their ability."After the league season in Iran, we came together for three training camps, before coming to Australia where we have had a few fruitful sessions, so I hope tomorrow we can show you a good match," she said.The 12-team competition begins Sunday and will be among the biggest stages for several players in the Iranian squad.Iran made its first appearance at the previous Asian Cup in India in 2022. The team lost to China and Taiwan but received recognition at home in a country where women’s rights are restricted."In India in 2022, the group was a little easier. Now in 2026 we enter with more experience but the group is more tough," Jafari said, referring to a pool that also features hosts Australia and the Philippines."But we (still) want to show in these games the potential of Iranian women."Iran qualified for the tournament after progressing through the qualifiers, sealing back-to-back appearances with a win over Jordan.Captain Zahra Ghanbari said the team has clear targets."I believe this tournament is great with great teams, but we really want to qualify for the World Cup," said the 33-year-old."We know these will be tough games, but we have a tough mentality and we want to do our best."The top six teams in the tournament will secure places at the 2027 World Cup in Brazil.
Article Summary: Iran’s 26-member squad reached the Gold Coast days before the attacks on Saturday, which killed supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. The team is scheduled to begin its campaign against South Korea on Monday. Iran made its first appearance at the previous Asian Cup in India in 2022.

Article Title: Amid US-Israel strikes, Iran captain sets bold target: 'We want to qualify for the World Cup'
Article Text:
Zahra Ghanbari (Image credit: X)

T20 World Cup 2026: Sourav Ganguly backs a batting spectacle at Eden Gardens

NEW DELHI: Football chiefs offered "full support and assistance" to the Iranian team in Australia on Sunday for the Women's Asian Cup after the United States and Israel launched massive attacks on their homeland. Iran's 26-strong squad arrived on the Gold Coast days before the strikes on Saturday killed supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei as Washington and Tel Aviv seek to topple the Islamic republic.They are due to open their tournament on Monday against South Korea.The Asian Football Confederation said in a statement it "continues to closely monitor the recent developments in the Middle East during this challenging period"."The AFC's foremost priority remains the welfare, safety and security of all players, coaches, officials and fans," it added."In this regard, we are in close and regular contact with the Iran women's national team and officials on the Gold Coast and are offering our full support and assistance."Iran coach Marziyeh Jafari held a pre-match press conference on Sunday but focused on football, saying the tournament was a chance to show "the potential of Iranian women"."After the league season in Iran, we came together for three training camps, before coming to Australia where we have had a few fruitful sessions, so I hope tomorrow we can show you a good match," she said.The 12-team tournament, which kicks off Sunday, will be one of the biggest stages ever for many Iranian players.They made a historic debut at the last Asian Cup in India in 2022 and suffered heavy defeats against China and Taiwan, but it made them national heroes in a country where women's rights are severely restricted."In India in 2022, the group was a little easier, now in 2026 we enter with more experience but the group is more tough," said Jafari of a group that also includes hosts Australia and the Philippines."But we (still) want to show in these games the potential of Iranian women."Iran showed grit to come through a challenging qualifying campaign for Australia that culminated with a win against favourites Jordan to seal a back-to-back appearance.Skipper Zahra Ghanbari said she was dreaming big."I believe this tournament is great with great teams, but we really want to qualify for the World Cup," said the 33-year-old."We know these will be tough games, but we have a tough mentality and we want to do our best."The top six finishers will qualify for the 2027 World Cup in Brazil.
Article Summary: Iran's 26-strong squad arrived on the Gold Coast days before the strikes on Saturday killed supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. The Asian Football Confederation said in a statement it "continues to closely monitor the recent developments in the Middle East" Iran coach Marziyeh Jafari said the tournament was a chance to show "the potential of Iranian women"

Article Title: Mohun Bagan blow away Mohammedan 5-1
Article Text:
Image credit: Mohun Bagan's X handle

Blasters suffer third consecutive loss

KOLKATA: After conceding for the first time in three matches, reigning champions Mohun Bagan SG blew away Mohammedan SC 5-1 on Saturday and went atop the Indian Super League table with a perfect record. Mohammedan SC, playing with an Indian squad because of a transfer ban, came into the contest as clear underdogs after losing their first two matches.However, they added a twist to the tale quicker than anticipated when Lalthankima met Lalngaihsaka’s corner-kick with a perfect header, gliding it past a fully-stretched Vishal Kaith in the 12th minute. However, the gulf in class and quality was so overwhelming that Sergio Lobera’s team took the setback as a wake-up call and soon came alive in the game with their usual might.Kochi: Kerala Blasters suffered their third straight loss after failing to make the most of their chances, losing 2-1 to Inter Kashi here, reports Rayson Tennyson. Nauris Petkevicius (34th) and Alfred Moya (78th) scored for Inter Kashi, while Victor Bertomeu pulled one back for the Blasters in the 84th minute.
Article Summary: Mohun Bagan SG beat Mohammedan SC 5-1 to go top of the Indian Super League. Kerala Blasters suffer third straight loss after losing 2-1 against Inter Kashi. Nauris Petkevicius and Alfred Moya scored for Inter.

Article Title: Man City stay close to Arsenal after win without Haaland in Premier League title race
Article Text:
Manchester City's Antoine Semenyo, left, reacts after scoring (AP Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

Salah Still Waiting for a Goal

Brentford

Wins in Late Drama

Pickford’s Amazing Save

Without injured striker Erling Haaland, Manchester City still managed to win. New signing Antoine Semenyo scored the only goal in a 1–0 victory over Leeds United in the Premier League.Semenyo scored in first-half stoppage time with a close-range finish after a low cross.It was his sixth goal in 11 matches since joining from Bournemouth in January.“We just need to control what we can control,” Semenyo said, “win our games and see what happens.”The win moved City to within two points of league leaders Arsenal.Arsenal will play Chelsea on Sunday. Both Arsenal and City have 10 matches left and look like the main teams fighting for the title.Haaland missed the game because of a "little" injury in training, according to City manager Pep Guardiola. Leeds had good chances and pushed hard at the end, but City held on for their fourth straight league win.Mohamed Salah has now gone 10 league games without scoring for Liverpool.Still, Liverpool had no trouble beating West Ham 5–2. Hugo Ekitike, Virgil van Dijk, Alexis Mac Allister and Cody Gakpo all scored, and there was also an own goal.It was the first time this season Liverpool scored more than four goals in a league match.Liverpool has won four matches in a row in all competitions. The team is now level on points with fourth-placed Manchester United, which plays Crystal Palace on Sunday.Salah’s last league goal came on Nov. 1 against Aston Villa. It is his longest scoring drought since he joined Liverpool in 2017.Brentford beat Burnley 4–3 in a very exciting game. Brentford led 3–0, but Burnley came back to make it 3–3.Burnley thought they had taken the lead, but Zian Flemming’s goal was ruled offside. Then in stoppage time, Mikkel Damsgaard scored the winner for Brentford.Burnley believed they had equalized again when Ashley Barnes scored very late, but the goal was ruled out for handball after a long VAR check.Everton beat Newcastle 3–2 in another exciting match.In stoppage time, Everton goalkeeper Jordan Pickford made a brilliant save to stop a powerful shot from Sandro Tonali.Everton manager David Moyes called it a “wonder save.”Pickford somehow turned the Italy international’s shot onto the crossbar, leading Everton manager David Moyes to say: “The biggest credit I could give the save would be to say that Tonali’s volley was textbook. Probably if he got it he couldn’t do any better if he tried again. It was so good, technique, on target.“It took a wonder save to make it happen."Newcastle scored through Jacob Ramsey and Jacob Murphy, but Everton answered each time. Goals from Beto and substitute Thierno Barry helped Everton secure the win.
Article Summary: Manchester City beat Leeds United 1–0 in the Premier League. New signing Antoine Semenyo scored the only goal in first-half stoppage time. Mohamed Salah has gone 10 league games without a goal for Liverpool. Brentford beat Burnley 4–3 in a very exciting game.

Article Title: Yamal nets first hat trick as Barcelona beat Villarreal in La Liga
Article Text:
Barcelona's Lamine Yamal celebrates after scoring (AP Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

FC Barcelona star Lamine Yamal scored the first hat trick of his career in a 4–1 win over Villarreal CF on Saturday.The victory moved Barcelona four points clear at the top of La Liga.At 18 years and 230 days old, Yamal became the youngest player to score his first hat trick in La Liga, according to Opta.His second goal was the highlight of the match. He cut in from the right wing, beat a defender, and curled a beautiful shot into the far corner.Barcelona coach Hansi Flick praised him after the game.“He’s exceptional and he’s here to make people happy," Barcelona coach Hansi Flick said. "We need his goals to give him confidence.He’s very young and he still has to improve, but everyone knows the quality he has."Opponents put two or three players on him and that makes it difficult. Today I’m very happy for him. When he enjoys his football, it’s perfect for him and for us.”Substitute Robert Lewandowski scored Barcelona’s fourth goal in stoppage time at Camp Nou.Second-placed Real Madrid will host Getafe CF on Monday and could cut Barcelona’s lead to one point with a win.In another match, Iñaki Williams scored for Athletic Bilbao in a 1–1 draw against Rayo Vallecano.Later, fourth-placed Atlético Madrid visited Real Oviedo. A win would move Atlético level on points with third-placed Villarreal.
Article Summary: Lamine Yamal scored the first hat trick of his career in a 4–1 win over Villarreal CF on Saturday. The victory moved Barcelona four points clear at the top of La Liga. At 18 years and 230 days old, Yamal became the youngest player to score his first hat three in La Liga, according to Opta.

Article Title: Dominiq Ponder Death: "A born leader": Deion Sanders mourns the tragic death of Colorado QB Dominiq Ponder at just 23
Article Text:
Deion Sanders mourns the tragic death of Colorado QB Dominiq Ponders at just 23 (Getty Images)

Deion Sanders leans on faith while honouring Dominiq Ponder, whom he called “one of my favorites”

Deion Sanders spoke from the heart on March 1, 2026. Hours after Colorado quarterback Dominiq Ponder died in a car crash, the Colorado Buffaloes coach shared a public tribute.Sanders did not talk about football. He spoke about leadership, respect, and faith. His message made clear why Ponder meant more to him than a name on the depth chart.In a post on X on March 1, Deion Sanders wrote, “God please comfort the Ponder family, friends & Loved ones. Dom was one of my favorites! He was Loved, Respected & a Born Leader. Let’s pray for all that knew him & had the opportunity to be in his presence. Lord, you’re receiving a good 1.”The words reflected Sanders’ long-standing approach to coaching.Since arriving in Boulder in December 2022, Sanders has built Colorado’s program around accountability, belief, and personal growth. He often speaks about leadership in his team meetings and public appearances. On Sunday, that philosophy surfaced again.Sanders has faced public criticism during his tenure, yet within the program, he has continued to emphasise character. Ponder fit that mould. The 23-year-old joined Colorado in 2024 after transferring from Bethune-Cookman, where Sanders previously coached before taking the Colorado job.Though Ponder did not play for Sanders at Bethune-Cookman, the shared HBCU connection carried weight.In Colorado, Ponder served as a backup quarterback. He appeared in limited action during the 2025 season. His most recent appearance came on November 2, 2025. Coaches valued his presence in meetings and practice sessions.Authorities later confirmed that Ponder died around 3:00 a.m. on March 1 in a single-car accident on Baseline Road in Boulder County. The Colorado State Patrol said his 2023 Tesla Model 3 lost control on a curve, struck a guardrail and pole, rolled down an embankment, and caught fire. He was pronounced dead at the scene.Sanders’ tribute did not mention the crash. Instead, he centred the message on faith and remembrance. That choice aligns with his history. Whether after wins, losses or personal setbacks, Sanders often turns to prayer publicly.By calling Ponder “one of my favorites” and “a Born Leader,” Sanders gave insight into their bond. In a program built on strong personalities and national attention, he chose to highlight humility and respect. For Colorado, the loss feels personal. For Sanders, it feels deeper.
Article Summary: Dominiq Ponder died in a car crash on March 1, 2026. Colorado coach Deion Sanders paid tribute to the 23-year-old on X. Ponder was a backup quarterback for the Buffaloes in 2025 and 2025.

Article Title: Chiefs’ Mike Pennel Jr. accuses Jhonni Blaze of extortion over alleged domestic violence and fake pregnancy claims
Article Text:
Mike Pennel Jr. claims Jhonni Blaze used false pregnancy to extort him (Instagram and Getty Images)

Mike Pennel Jr. addresses extortion claims: why the Chiefs veteran says the allegations are false



Mike Pennel Jr. did not wait for rumors to settle. The Kansas City Chiefs defensive tackle used his own platform to push back hard against allegations swirling online, accusing social media personality Jhonni Blaze of trying to extort him with what he called false claims of domestic violence and a fake pregnancy. The dispute, which erupted publicly this week, has unfolded almost entirely on Instagram, where both sides have traded accusations in real time.Pennel, whose full name is Michael Maurice Pennel Jr., made his stance clear in a string of Instagram Stories on Saturday. He directly tagged Blaze and rejected her claims, framing the situation as a calculated attempt to pressure him for money. “She tried to extort me so Many times.Fake pregnancy fake domestic violence All for money… @bigjhonni,” Pennel wrote. In another post, he added, “@bigjhonni You crashing out because i wont let you extort me??? Mental health is real. Somebody save her…”The back and forth began after Blaze, known online as @bigjhonni and recognized for past appearances in music videos, accused Pennel earlier this week of verbal abuse, infidelity and conduct that she claims led to her mother being hospitalized.She said she had dated Pennel since March of last year and claimed to possess 15,000 messages as proof. According to Blaze, she stayed quiet for two years to protect him before deciding to speak out.Pennel’s response was swift and detailed. He alleged that Blaze ignored a restraining order he secured against her, avoided being formally served and dismissed a cease and desist letter from his attorney. He also posted screenshots that appeared to show PayPal requests from Blaze, ranging from small sums to as much as $50,000. He described the situation as an “ongoing harassment scheme.”Blaze denied that any restraining order exists and insisted she would “stand on” her claims. She later shared what she described as receipts, including OnlyFans activity that she said showed Pennel as a subscriber who sent her money. At one point, she reportedly leaked his phone numbers online, escalating tensions further.Pennel answered again with video posts and messages, writing that “EVERYTHING will be revealed… PUBLICLY GOD BLESS” and accusing Blaze of tagging him in a “fake story for a month” while evading legal service.As of Saturday evening, no criminal charges have been filed against either party. The NFL has not commented. For now, this remains a deeply personal dispute playing out in public, with both sides claiming to hold the evidence that will ultimately decide who is telling the truth.
Article Summary: Kansas City Chiefs defensive tackle Mike Pennel Jr. accused Jhonni Blaze of trying to extort him. Blaze accused Pennel of verbal abuse, infidelity and conduct that led to her mother being hospitalized. She said she had dated Pennel since March of last year and claimed to possess 15,000 messages as proof.

Article Title: Kristin Juszczyk turns heads in stunning blue bikini selfie during 49ers offseason break
Article Text:
Kristin Juszczyk and Kyle Juszczyk (Getty Images)

Kristin Juszczyk bikini selfie draws attention during 49ers offseason



Kristin Juszczyk's February 28 Instagram story (Instagram)

Kristin Juszczyk did not need a playoff spotlight to grab attention. Even as the San Francisco 49ers sort through a bruising finish to their 2025-26 campaign, her name found fresh buzz online. Football may be quiet in Santa Clara, but her offseason is anything but. On February 28, a simple Instagram Story reminded fans that influence does not pause when the games stop.The timing felt almost ironic. Months after the 49ers’ season ended in frustration, and weeks after the confetti settled on Super Bowl LX, attention briefly swung from film rooms and injury rehab to fashion and personal brand power. It was a different kind of headline, but in today’s NFL world, that still counts.The 49ers’ season never quite recovered from the hits it absorbed early. Star edge rusher Nick Bosa tore his ACL in Week 3, a blow that demanded surgery and wiped out the rest of his year. The defense adjusted, but it never felt whole again. Even so, San Francisco pushed into the playoffs and stunned the defending champion Philadelphia Eagles 23-19 in the Wild Card round.That win came at a price. Tight end George Kittle tore his Achilles during the game, draining life from an offense already juggling injuries.When the Divisional Round arrived on January 17, NFC West rival Seattle Seahawks made sure there would be no miracle run. The 41-6 loss was decisive. Seattle went on to lift the Lombardi.One thing the 49ers did manage to protect was their backfield. Christian McCaffrey stayed healthy all season, silencing doubts about his durability. Fullback Kyle Juszczyk also suited up week after week, steady as ever. His consistency is appreciated in the locker room. At home, though, Kristin may be the bigger star.Her custom designs have become a staple on social media, often blending NFL loyalty with high-end style. What began as playful, personalized game-day outfits evolved into Off Season, her growing fashion brand. Players’ partners across the league now wear her pieces. Fans buy them. The reach keeps expanding.On February 28, she posted a blue bikini selfie paired with sunglasses and a hat, adding custom-made Golden State Warriors pants and a purchase link. It was relaxed. Confident. Unbothered by the noise of a tough football ending.The 49ers will spend the coming months healing and recalibrating. Kristin Juszczyk, meanwhile, seems perfectly comfortable shaping her own spotlight, one post at a time.
Article Summary: Kristin Juszczyk posted a bikini selfie on Instagram on February 28. The San Francisco 49ers are in the midst of an offseason. Her custom designs have become a staple on social media, often blending NFL loyalty with high-end style.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Jordan Love’s future with the Packers questioned as Caleb Williams hype reaches new heights
Article Text:
Trade speculation erupted after an analyst suggested the Packers would swap Jordan Love for Bears star Caleb Williams. The claim triggered strong reactions, including a sharp response from Micah Parsons’ brother. Williams’ breakout 2025 season has fueled comparisons with Love, while Chicago also fields trade interest in backup Tyson Bagent, adding intrigue to the team’s quarterback future.

Caleb Williams ’ breakout season fuels shocking Jordan Love speculation

Arguments over quarterbacks in NFC north are not new and the latest gossip has placed Caleb Williams in the middle of a hurricane. Chicago Bears signal caller has risen as the lightening rod and point of comparison in the league after an excellent 2025 season. Due to his rapid progress, fans and analysts are drawing comparisons of his path with the one of a reliable leader of the Green Bay Packers, Jordan Love The discussion got hot when a bold trading idea was publicized on the Internet, and it provoked an uproar among fan communities. What began as a hypothetical statement, quickly transformed into an exercise on the value, prospects, and affections of quarterbacks. With both teams shaping their futures around young passers, even hypothetical trade chatter carries emotional weight in one of football’s most storied rivalries.Sports Illustrated insider Grant Cohn poured fuel on the rivalry when he wrote that the Packers "would trade Jordan Love for Caleb Williams in a heartbeat." The statement spread rapidly, drawing reactions from fans and players’ circles alike. Terrence Parsons Jr., brother of Micah Parsons, responded with a pointed challenge: "Are you sure?" His reply reflected the belief among many in Green Bay that Love remains a cornerstone, not a trade chip.On the field, the comparison is compelling. Williams threw for 3,942 yards with 27 touchdowns and only seven interceptions in 2025, leading Chicago into playoff contention and defeating Green Bay along the way. Love countered with 3,381 yards and 23 touchdowns against six interceptions, maintaining efficiency while guiding a competitive Packers squad. Pro Football Focus ranked Love No. 37 in its Top 101 list, while Williams, despite his impact, did not make the cut.Chicago’s quarterback room adds another layer to the conversation. Backup Tyson Bagent has drawn interest from teams seeking a young and affordable option. At the NFL Combine, general manager Ryan Poles and head coach Ben Johnson confirmed they have received inquiries. Reports suggest the Bears would consider a deal for the 25 year old if compensation approaches a second round value.For now, Williams remains firmly entrenched as Chicago’s future. Yet the noise surrounding his rise shows how quickly perception can shift in the NFL. Even hypothetical trades could generate real feelings in a division that is characterized by quarterback legacy and pride in rivalry.
Article Summary: Caleb Williams’ breakout 2025 season has fueled comparisons with Jordan Love. Chicago also fields trade interest in backup Tyson Bagent, adding intrigue to the team’s quarterback future. Sports Illustrated insider Grant Cohn wrote that the Packers "would trade Jordan Love for Caleb Williams in a heartbeat"

Article Title: “NFL games have destroyed my….”: Jason Kelce shares heartbreaking truth about the pain he still carries after retirement
Article Text:
Jason Kelce has revealed that years of NFL punishment continue to affect his body, especially his ankles, even during casual golf. The former Eagles center said football “destroyed” his ankles, limiting movement and training. Despite ongoing pain and past injuries, Kelce remains active in media and golf, including a TGL commentary role, as he adjusts to life after retirement.

Jason Kelce’s emotional admission shows the real cost of his legendary toughness

Retirement has not slowed Jason Kelce. If anything, it has revealed the hidden cost of his rugged NFL career. The former Philadelphia Eagles center built a reputation as one of football’s toughest ironmen, but life after the trenches is forcing him to confront the physical toll left behind. Even a relaxed round of golf now reminds him that durability in the league often comes with a long-term price.Kelce’s growing obsession with golf has opened a new chapter in his post-NFL identity. Yet the sport’s simple movements have exposed lingering injuries he once powered through on game days. While promoting a new video project, the Super Bowl champion admitted that years of punishment in the NFL continue to shape how he walks, trains, and even chooses footwear.Jason Kelce wrote on X, “I’ve fallen in love with golf, and the season is getting ready to get revved up again. One thing I have struggled with is my weak ankles. Years of NFL games have destroyed my ankles; I don’t know that I’m cut out for just golf shoes.”The comment accompanied promotion for his YouTube feature Golf Shoes Suck, So I Made My Own, where Kelce experiments with customized golf footwear to compensate for ankle instability.The issue is rooted in a career defined by resilience. He started 156 consecutive games from 2014 onward and routinely played through injuries that would sideline most players.His injury history stretches back to a 2012 ACL tear that wiped out a full season. Later years brought a partial MCL tear, a broken foot, a fractured elbow that required a brace, and ligament damage in his ankle during the 2022 campaign. On a 2025 episode of New Heights, Kelce acknowledged how retirement has made the wear feel more immediate.“I’m trying to lift weights, straining muscles. My ankle, playing golf last week, is inflamed. I can’t squat now because my ankle hurts. I can’t bench because I sprained my pecs,” he said. “For a player who only missed significant time twice in his entire NFL career, the breakdown feels sudden and real.”Despite the setbacks, Kelce continues to reinvent himself. He is set to join the broadcast team for the tech-driven TGL league, founded by Tiger Woods and Rory McIlroy, blending golf, entertainment, and innovation. For Kelce, the fairway may hurt, but it also offers a new arena to compete, connect, and stay in the game.
Article Summary: Jason Kelce has revealed that years of NFL punishment continue to affect his body, especially his ankles. The former Eagles center said football “destroyed” his ankles, limiting movement and training. Despite ongoing pain and past injuries, Kelce remains active in media and golf, including a TGL commentary role.

Article Title: Jordon Hudson sparks backlash after Tom Brady comparison revives Belichick age-gap debate
Article Text:
Jordon Hudson sparked widespread conversation after joking that a 24-year-old cheer flyer is equivalent to a 42-year-old quarterback, referencing Tom Brady’s longevity. The viral post connected cheer athletics with football history while renewing attention on her relationship with Bill Belichick. The lighthearted remark drew praise, debate, and fresh scrutiny of the couple’s high-profile age gap.

Jordon Hudson draws attention again as Tom Brady reference fuels online debate

Jordon Hudson never expected a cheer competition post to ignite a football debate, yet one playful comparison has placed her at the center of sports chatter. The 24-year-old former cheerleader and partner of Bill Belichick shared a snapshot from the NCA All-Star Nationals that included a “Be Old” pin beside her cheer ring, pairing humor with a nod to longevity in elite competition.Hudson's caption quickly caught fire: "For the record, a 24 y/o flyer is the equivalent of a 42 y/o quarterback." The line resonated across football circles because it echoed the legendary durability of Tom Brady, whose career peak at age 42 remains one of the sport’s most enduring benchmarks. What began as self-deprecating humor soon evolved into a wider conversation linking cheer athletics, NFL history, and Hudson’s high-profile relationship.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.In all-star cheerleading, flyers are often the youngest athletes on a team. At 24, Hudson sits above the typical age range, which gave her comparison both context and comedic bite. She acknowledged the physical demands of her sport while bridging two rarely overlapping worlds by comparing her experience to Brady's late-career dominance.Additionally, the post reignited public interest in her relationship with Belichick, a six-time Super Bowl champion and current head coach at the University of North Carolina. Their nearly 50-year age gap has sparked debate, jokes, and media attention since the couple went public in 2024.Snoop Dogg joked at the 2025 NFL Honors that he had been a football fan for so long that Belichick's girlfriend "wasn't even born yet," highlighting how the age difference has entered the public consciousness.Hudson has occasionally pushed back on intrusive curiosity. During a promotional appearance, when a reporter pressed for details about how the couple met, she interjected, "We're not talking about this." Belichick later defended her response, saying she was keeping the focus on his work rather than personal speculation.Beyond the headlines, Jordon Hudson has carved out a growing presence in business and branding efforts tied to Bill Belichick’s ventures. Supporters see ambition and confidence. Critics see opportunism. In any case, her post on social media demonstrates that even one line, spoken in a funny manner, can tie cheer mats, NFL history, and sports culture nowadays into one viral piece.
Article Summary: Jordon Hudson sparked widespread conversation after joking that a 24-year-old cheer flyer is equivalent to a 42- year-old quarterback. The lighthearted remark drew praise, debate, and fresh scrutiny of the couple’s high-profile age gap. The viral post connected cheer athletics with football history.

Article Title: “Who you playing with, motherf*****”: Cardi B seemingly targets Offset and Stefon Diggs with fiery concert moment
Article Text:
Cardi B sparked viral buzz after delivering a fiery onstage message in San Francisco that fans believe targeted exes Offset and Stefon Diggs. Her bold remarks about self-worth and respect ignited speculation online, with supporters praising her confidence and critics fueling drama narratives. The moment reinforced her unapologetic persona and ability to command attention through raw, unfiltered honesty.

Fans think Cardi B targeted Offset and Stefon Diggs in fiery concert moment

Fans think Cardi B took shots at her exes Offset and Stefon Diggs during a heated moment in her San Francisco show that set social media on fire. The rapper stopped in the middle of his set to give a blunt speech about self-worth and relationships. This drove the crowd wild and led to viral clips that spread quickly across platforms.The moment hit home because it combined Cardi's trademark confidence with real emotion. Her words sounded less like scripted stage talk and more like a declaration of freedom. Fans were breaking down every line within hours, linking it to her past relationships and celebrating what they saw as a public reclaiming of power.Videos from the show captured Cardi delivering a bold statement that many interpreted as a warning to anyone who underestimates her value. She told the crowd:“You can't be out here playing with a b**** like me. This n****'s out here praying for a b**** like me. You hear me? I'm too sexy to be lonely and too grown to be playing with, n****. Who you playing with, motherf*****?”Though Cardi did not mention anyone by name, online reactions quickly linked the remarks to Offset, her on-again, off-again husband, and NFL star Stefon Diggs, whom she has been rumored to have dated. Some fans praised her for setting limits and being confident, while others saw the moment as a subtle public message to her exes.Cardi B has never been afraid to talk about her problems in her music and in public. She has built her career on being honest about relationships, being a mother, and being independent. Fans are interested in her story because it is real.The viral moment is also a sign of a bigger change in culture. More and more, female artists use live performances to show their independence and change the way people think about love, respect, and self-worth. Cardi's statement fits perfectly with that movement.Whether the message was aimed at specific exes or simply a statement of self-respect, the response has been unmistakable. Fans see strength. Critics see drama. Cardi B sees control of her own narrative.
Article Summary: Fans think Cardi B targeted Offset and Stefon Diggs in fiery concert moment. The rapper stopped in the middle of his set to give a blunt speech about self-worth and relationships. The moment reinforced her unapologetic persona and ability to command attention through raw, unfiltered honesty.

Article Title: “She has down drome”: Brittany Mahomes faces brutal fan reactions following NFL WAGs lineup video
Article Text:
Brittany Mahomes drew intense online reactions after appearing in the Sports Illustrated Swimsuit NFL WAGs promo video. While some fans praised her introduction and confidence, many mocked her inclusion and appearance, sparking a heated social media debate. The mixed response highlights the scrutiny NFL partners face and how public visibility often invites both admiration and harsh criticism.

Fans mock Brittany Mahomes after SI Swimsuit promo sparks backlash online

Brittany Mahomes stepped into the spotlight this week after appearing in the Sports Illustrated Swimsuit NFL WAGs lineup promo, a football-themed introduction video that blended fashion with game-day theatrics. The wife of Patrick Mahomes joined a group of high-profile partners connected to the league, helping deliver a polished, Sunday Night Football-style rollout that quickly gained traction online.The production itself got a lot of attention for its creativity and star power, but the response on the internet was much less unified. Social media reactions ranged from enthusiastic praise to harsh criticism, turning the moment into another example of how visible sports spouses often become lightning rods for fan opinion.Several commenters openly questioned Brittany Mahomes’ inclusion in the lineup video. One user wrote, “How did Brittany get in there? 😂” Another added, “Sneaking in Mahomes wife in there I see.”Some reactions turned sharper in tone. A commenter wrote, “Brittany Mahomes looks like she has down drone. At least it’s a magazine and we’re not subjected to her talking.” Another post read, “Brittney has NO business being on this list, the ONLY reason she is, is because her husband has won multiple championships.”Criticism also targeted appearance and perceived celebrity status.One user wrote, “Pat wife really a 5 but ima let yall think she cute,” while another commented, “Brittany Mahomes getting insanely frame mogged.”Others compared the featured group, suggesting different standards of attractiveness and celebrity appeal: “The only three that are really attractive are Normani, Ronika Love and Christen Goff. The others are all sub-7s. Maybe they locked them down before they made it to the league but when other women see very average women like these ending up with pro athletes it messes up the game.”Not all reactions were negative. One supportive fan wrote, “Britney Mahomes had THE BEST INTRO!! Lesssgo moms!”The mixed reaction highlights the unique scrutiny faced by NFL partners who build public identities beyond their relationships. Brittany Mahomes is a fitness entrepreneur, co-owner of the Kansas City Current, and a well-known supporter of her husband's career.But when Brittany's in the public eye, she often starts arguments that go beyond the original moment. As the video keeps going around online, the conversation shows a common pattern in sports culture: admiration, criticism, and constant commentary all fighting for attention in the digital world.
Article Summary: Brittany Mahomes appeared in the Sports Illustrated Swimsuit NFL WAGs promo video. Some fans praised her introduction and confidence, while others mocked her inclusion and appearance. The mixed response highlights the scrutiny NFL partners face and how public visibility often invites both admiration and harsh criticism.

Article Title: Fact check: Was Kendall Jenner "uncomfortable" as Kim Kardashian and Lewis Hamilton sparked romance rumors at Super Bowl LX?
Article Text:
Fact check: Was Kendall Jenner "uncomfortable" as Kim Kardashian and Lewis Hamilton sparked romance rumors at Super Bowl LX?(Image via Getty Images)

Did Kendall Jenner feel uneasy at Super Bowl LX as Kim Kardashian and Lewis Hamilton turned heads with their romance?

Kendall Jenner appeared excited and happy for her ex boyfriend, Bad Bunny, as he broke records with his performance at the halftime show

As the Seattle Seahawks and the New England Patriots took the field for Super Bowl LX, many were shocked to see supermodel Kendall Jenner , along with her half sister, Kim Kardashian, and her new boyfriend, Lewis Hamilton, attend the match.Kendall Jenner and Lewis Hamilton used to date at one point and seeing him with Kim Kardashian sparked chaos among fans. Amid this, Kendall Jenner’s another ex boyfriend, Bad Bunny , headlined the halftime show as she cheered him on. Now, there are rumors that the super model is “uncomfortable” with the setup.A few hours ago, a post on X claiming that Kendall Jenner is “uncomfortable” with Kim Kardashian and Lewis Hamilton’s romance rumors has sparked panic.This has sparked chaos as many believe that this can be causing a rift between the two sisters.However, the post is entirely false and is a completely fabricated story. Neither Kim Kardashian nor Kendall Jenner has responded to the rumors yet.But the fake post has now caused a divide among fans.Many feel that Kim Kardashian and Lewis Hamilton should not have went public with their romance at Super Bowl LX as they attended it with Kendall Jenner, while others feel the supermodel should move on.A fan by the username @PoliticsNcats1 wrote, “Kim should know better, that’s just ho code and sister code. Nasty.”Another fan by the username @TinoLoves2Code wrote, “Maybe it’s you he likes… maybe he is just using Kim to get to you. That brother has game up his sleeves.”While fans were confused watching Kim Kardashian and Lewis Hamilton romance at Super Bowl LX, others felt Kendall Jenner might have rekindled her romance with Bad Bunny.The popular supermodel and Kardashian sister, Kendall Jenner, appeared excited as she cheered on Bad Bunny during his record breaking performance at the halftime show.However, Bad Bunny and Kendall Jenner have not rekindled their romance as he was spotted with another ex of his on a vacation after the show.Though Bad Bunny’s performance has divided the country and many political figures have had many controversial opinions about it, the popular Grammy winner has maintained silence and stayed distant.

Article Title: “She is hideous”: Fans accuse Taylor Swift of flying to London to meet Joe Alwyn while dating Travis Kelce
Article Text:
Fans online have sparked fresh controversy by linking Taylor Swift’s recent lyrics and London visit to ex Joe Alwyn, dragging Travis Kelce into the debate. Social media theories question her artistic references and current relationship, though no evidence supports the claims. The episode highlights how Swift’s storytelling and high-profile romance continue to fuel speculation and intense fan scrutiny.

Taylor Swift’s London trip and lyrics ignite Joe Alwyn chatter, Travis Kelce relationship questioned

Online chatter around Taylor Swift rarely stays quiet for long, and this week’s discussion has taken an unexpected turn. What started as fans guessing about artistic references in her music has turned into a bigger argument that includes her current partner Travis Kelce and her ex-boyfriend Joe Alwyn . The renewed attention shows how Swift's lyrics, public appearances, and personal history continue to spark intense fan interpretation.The spark came from comments on social media that picked apart literary references and rumors about Swift's past relationship. Some people started to wonder if her creative choices show that she still has ties to Alwyn, while others said that fans are reading too much into symbolic storytelling. The conversation quickly expanded, with Kelce’s name surfacing as commenters weighed the stability and authenticity of the pop superstar’s current romance.One commenter wrote, “I would also love to know why she is referencing hamlet, in her new album,, since her ex partner is in not one but 2 hamlet plays? I thought she was so happy with Travis? Can you tell us why sweetheart? Why did she travel all the way to the uk to promote the album”.The person added a literary connection: “Fun fact: in the song ‘fate of Ophelia’, Taylor references the lines Laertes says in act 1, Scene 3. Joe Alwyn her ex boyfriend plays Laertes in the movie fate of Ophelia. But I thought she was so in love with BDT?”The speculation intensified with a more pointed claim: “Fun fact: Taylor Swift has tried multiple times to get into contact with Joe Alwyn.He refuses to ever engage with her. He hates her and thinks she is hideous. Taylor, is it true you tried to meet up with him when you flew to London for the Beyoncé premiere lol.”There is no verified evidence supporting such claims. Taylor Swift has long used literature and poetry in her songwriting, and references to Shakespearean themes predate her relationship with Joe Alwyn. Her recent trip to London was widely reported as part of promotional appearances and industry events rather than a personal meeting.Swift and Kelce, meanwhile, remain one of pop culture’s most talked about couples. Since they went public in 2023, they have been able to balance NFL commitments, global tours, and regular public support for each other's careers. Kelce has been to a lot of tour stops, and Swift has been to Chiefs games when she can.Fans often connect Swift's lyrics to her own life, and her stories are open to interpretation. In the social media age, that curiosity can quickly spiral into speculation that blends art, memory, and romance into one ongoing narrative.
Article Summary: Social media theories question her artistic references and current relationship, though no evidence supports the claims. The renewed attention shows how Swift's lyrics, public appearances, and personal history continue to spark intense fan interpretation. The episode highlights how Swift’s storytelling and high-profile romance continue to fuel speculation and intense fan scrutiny.
